_note: Reference parameters for the plan generator. Progressive overload logic is computed in generate-plans.js. Update this file to change training parameters — settings.html reflects changes live.

progressive_overload.increase_trigger: All sets hit target reps (none missed by more than 2)
progressive_overload.hold_trigger: Any set missed target reps by more than 2
progressive_overload.reduce_trigger: More than 20% of total reps missed across the session
progressive_overload._note: Dumbbell increment is per hand. Progression is computed per exercise from actual log vs plan targets.

ramp_up.intent: Learn movements, establish baselines, keep RPE ≤8

peak.intent: Intensity, RPE 9–10, reduce isolation volume if needed

session_design._note: Session templates are enforced in generate-plans.js SESSION_TEMPLATES. This is a human-readable summary.
session_design.Push A: Flat Bench Press lead → Incline press → Shoulder press → Lateral raises → 2x triceps (pushdown + overhead)
session_design.Push B: Overhead press lead → Chest FLY (not press) → Lateral raises (cable) → 1x triceps DIFFERENT from Push A
session_design.Pull A: Lat pulldown (overhand) → Cable row → Face pull (required) → Supinating curl → Hammer curl
session_design.Pull B: Barbell row lead → Unilateral row → Lat pulldown (underhand/neutral) → Rear delt fly → 1x bicep DIFFERENT from Pull A
session_design.Legs A: SQUAT pattern lead (not leg press) → Dumbbell RDL → Leg extension → Leg curl → Standing calf raise
session_design.Legs B: Barbell RDL lead → Unilateral leg → Leg curl → Leg extension → Seated calf raise
